input.task: Initialize an Express API project with TypeScript and decide on a database.

db_new_contexts.name: Database: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM. Chosen for ACID transaction support needed...
db_new_contexts.abstract: Database: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM. Chosen for ACID transaction support needed for payment processing. Prisma provides type-safe queries and () API for atomic multi-step payment operations.

db_new_contexts.name: Project structure: src/routes (Express routers), src/middleware (error handler, ...
db_new_contexts.abstract: Project structure: src/routes (Express routers), src/middleware (error handler, auth, validation), src/models (Prisma client singleton + domain logic). Entry point: src/index.ts. Routes mounted at /ap...

expected.ground_truth: Agent should create project structure and save a decision memory about PostgreSQL + Prisma choice with the ACID/payments rationale.

input.task: Add JWT authentication middleware based on a prior decision.

db_new_contexts.name: JWT authentication uses RS256 (asymmetric) instead of HS256 (symmetric). Securit...
db_new_contexts.abstract: JWT authentication uses RS256 (asymmetric) instead of HS256 (symmetric). Security team mandated asymmetric signing for payment endpoints so API servers only hold public keys — a compromised server c...

db_new_contexts.name: JWT key rotation: public keys stored as .pem files in keys/ directory (configura...
db_new_contexts.abstract: JWT key rotation: public keys stored as .pem files in keys/ directory (configurable via JWT_KEYS_DIR env var). Filename (without .pem) is the kid. Keys are cached in memory and reloaded hourly. Token ...

expected.ground_truth: Agent should implement auth middleware and save the RS256 decision. Bonus if it references the prior PostgreSQL decision when thinking about the payment system.

input.task: Create a users CRUD endpoint that uses the auth middleware.

db_new_contexts.name: CRUD route pattern: each resource gets its own Router file in src/routes/, mount...
db_new_contexts.abstract: CRUD route pattern: each resource gets its own Router file in src/routes/, mounted in routes/index.ts. Auth middleware applied at router level via router.use(authenticate). Validation is inline (no ex...

db_new_contexts.name: User model: id (uuid), email (unique), name, role (default 'user'), createdAt, u...
db_new_contexts.abstract: User model: id (uuid), email (unique), name, role (default 'user'), createdAt, updatedAt. Valid roles: user, admin. Inline validation in routes — no validation library.

expected.ground_truth: Agent should recall the auth middleware and PostgreSQL/Prisma decisions from memory without being reminded of the specifics. Should search memory for prior context.

input.task: Fix a bug in the auth middleware and save the debugging case.

db_new_contexts.name: Bug fix in auth middleware: single try/catch around getKeyForToken() + jwt.verif...
db_new_contexts.abstract: Bug fix in auth middleware: single try/catch around getKeyForToken() + jwt.verify() caused silent failures. When key resolution threw a plain Error (missing keys dir, unknown kid), it was caught by th...

expected.ground_truth: Agent should fix the bug and save a case memory about the silent JWT expiration failure. Should reference the auth middleware it built in task 2.

input.task: Create a payments endpoint that ties together all prior decisions.

expected.ground_truth: Agent should search memory and retrieve: (1) PostgreSQL + Prisma for ACID, (2) RS256 auth for payment endpoints, (3) the JWT expiration bug fix. Implementation should reflect all accumulated knowledge.
